titles.ar: باب الرَّجُلِ يَعْفُو عَنِ الْحَدِّ ثُمَّ يَرْجِعُ فِيهِ وَ الرَّجُلِ يَقُولُ لِلرَّجُلِ يَا ابْنَ الْفَاعِلَةِ وَ لِأُمِّهِ وَلِيَّانِ
titles.en: Chapter 55 – The man excuses from the Penalty (Hadd), then retracts with regards to it, and the man is saying to the man, ‘O son of the ‘sexually active’ (prostitute), and for his mother are two guardians
